"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact

Potential Denial-of-Service when attacker sends deeply nested JSON if (and only if) service:

1. Reads deeply nested (1000s of levels) JSON as `JsonNode` (ObjectMapper.readTree())
2. Writes out same (or modifided) node using `JsonNode.toString()`

which can consume significant amount of resources with concurrent relatively small requests (1000 nested arrays is 2kB).

### Patches

Fixed in 2.14.0 via https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/issues/3447.

### Workarounds

Avoid serializing `JsonNode` using `toString()`: use ObjectMapper.writeValueAsString(node)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00616, "percentile": 0.45506}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3wrr-7qpf-2prh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T21:21:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3wrr-7qpf-2prh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3wrr-7qpf-2prh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50193"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T21:21:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security/advisories/GHSA-3wrr-7qpf-2prh", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/issues/3447", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/a1fa4ae4ecf5cee16da465985f135f3e81816f8c", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3wrr-7qpf-2prh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security-advisories/GHSA-3wrr-7qpf-2prh", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind", "summary": "jackson-databind: Deeply nested JsonNode throws StackOverflowError for toString()", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T21:21:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3wrr-7qpf-2prh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.14.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.10.0, <= 2.13.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: jackson-databind: Deeply nested JsonNode throws StackOverflowError for toString()
